text:
it is the FDB drug strength for a drug product on the 
formulary. 

SHORT NAME: STR 

LONG NAME: STR 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 10 

SOURCE: First DataBank 

VALUES: 10-digit alpha/numeric value (e.g., 25MG, 1:10000, or 10MG/100ML) 

COMMENT: Description of drug potency may be expressed in units of grams, milligrams, percentage, and other 
terms. 

In the formulary file, this variable is populated by matching the drug products on the Part D plan 
submitted formulary to FDB. Part D plan sponsors
